content:
{
  "dialogues": [
    {
      "title": "在咖啡店點飲料",
      "turns": [
        {
          "speaker": "店員",
          "text": "你好，請問想要喝什麼？",
          "pinyin": "Nǐ hǎo, qǐng wèn xiǎng yào hē shénme?",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Ni3 hao3, qing3 wen4 xiang3 yao4 he1 shen2 me?",
          "translation_en": "Hello, what would you like to drink?",
          "translation_ko": "안녕하세요, 무엇을 드시겠어요?"
        },
        {
          "speaker": "客人",
          "text": "你好，我想要一杯小杯的拿鐵，少冰。",
          "pinyin": "Nǐ hǎo, wǒ xiǎng yào yī bēi xiǎo bēi de ná tiě, shǎo bīng.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Ni3 hao3, wo3 xiang3 yao4 yi1 bei1 xiao3 bei1 de na2 tie3, shao3 bing1.",
          "translation_en": "Hello, I'd like a small latte with less ice.",
          "translation_ko": "안녕하세요, 작은 사이즈 라떼 한 잔에 얼음 적게 해 주세요."
        },
        {
          "speaker": "店員",
          "text": "好的，拿鐵小杯少冰。請問還要別的嗎？",
          "pinyin": "Hǎo de, ná tiě xiǎo bēi shǎo bīng. Qǐng wèn hái yào bié de ma?",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Hao3 de, na2 tie3 xiao3 bei1 shao3 bing1. Qing3 wen4 hai2 yao4 bie2 de ma?",
          "translation_en": "Okay, small latte with less ice. Anything else?",
          "translation_ko": "네, 작은 라떼에 얼음 적게요. 다른 것도 필요하신가요?"
        },
        {
          "speaker": "客人",
          "text": "不用了，謝謝。這樣就好。",
          "pinyin": "Bù yòng le, xiè xiè. Zhè yàng jiù hǎo.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Bu4 yong4 le, xie4 xie4. Zhe4 yang4 jiu4 hao3.",
          "translation_en": "No, thank you. That's all.",
          "translation_ko": "괜찮습니다, 감사합니다. 이걸로 됐어요."
        },
        {
          "speaker": "店員",
          "text": "好的，總共是八十塊。內用還是外帶？",
          "pinyin": "Hǎo de, zǒng gòng shì bā shí kuài. Nèi yòng hái shì wài dài?",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Hao3 de, zong3 gong4 shi4 ba1 shi2 kuai4. Nei4 yong4 hai2 shi4 wai4 dai4?",
          "translation_en": "Okay, that's 80 dollars total. For here or to go?",
          "translation_ko": "네, 총 80위안입니다. 드시고 가시나요, 포장하시나요?"
        },
        {
          "speaker": "客人",
          "text": "外帶，麻煩你。",
          "pinyin": "Wài dài, má fan nǐ.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Wai4 dai4, ma2 fan5 ni3.",
          "translation_en": "To go, please.",
          "translation_ko": "포장해 주세요."
        },
        {
          "speaker": "店員",
          "text": "沒問題，請等一下。",
          "pinyin": "Méi wèn tí, qǐng děng yī xià.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Mei2 wen4 ti2, qing3 deng3 yi1 xia4.",
          "translation_en": "No problem, please wait a moment.",
          "translation_ko": "문제없습니다, 잠시만 기다려 주세요."
        }
      ],
      "comprehension_questions": [
        {
          "question_en": "What did the customer order?",
          "question_ko": "손님은 무엇을 주문했습니까?",
          "options_en": ["Small latte with less ice", "Medium latte with no ice", "Large latte with ice"],
          "options_ko": ["작은 라떼에 얼음 적게", "중간 라떼에 얼음 없이", "큰 라떼에 얼음 많이"],
          "correct_index": 0
        }
      ],
      "shadowing_prompt": "Repeat each line after the speaker, focusing on tone and rhythm.",
      "free_response_prompt": "Pretend you are the customer. Order a small latte with less ice for takeout."
    },
    {
      "title": "確認價錢",
      "turns": [
        {
          "speaker": "客人",
          "text": "不好意思，請問這個紅茶大杯的價錢是多少？",
          "pinyin": "Bù hǎo yì si, qǐng wèn zhè ge hóng chá dà bēi de jià qián shì duō shǎo?",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Bu4 hao3 yi4 si5, qing3 wen4 zhe4 ge5 hong2 cha2 da4 bei1 de jia4 qian2 shi4 duo1 shao3?",
          "translation_en": "Excuse me, how much is this large black tea?",
          "translation_ko": "실례합니다, 이 홍차 큰 사이즈는 가격이 얼마인가요?"
        },
        {
          "speaker": "店員",
          "text": "大杯紅茶是三十五塊。",
          "pinyin": "Dà bēi hóng chá shì sān shí wǔ kuài.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Da4 bei1 hong2 cha2 shi4 san1 shi2 wu3 kuai4.",
          "translation_en": "The large black tea is 35 dollars.",
          "translation_ko": "큰 홍차는 35위안입니다."
        },
        {
          "speaker": "客人",
          "text": "那中杯的呢？",
          "pinyin": "Nà zhōng bēi de ne?",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Na4 zhong1 bei1 de ne?",
          "translation_en": "And the medium?",
          "translation_ko": "그럼 중간 사이즈는요?"
        },
        {
          "speaker": "店員",
          "text": "中杯是二十五塊。",
          "pinyin": "Zhōng bēi shì èr shí wǔ kuài.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Zhong1 bei1 shi4 er4 shi2 wu3 kuai4.",
          "translation_en": "The medium is 25 dollars.",
          "translation_ko": "중간 사이즈는 25위안입니다."
        },
        {
          "speaker": "客人",
          "text": "好，我要一杯中杯紅茶，少冰，半糖。",
          "pinyin": "Hǎo, wǒ yào yī bēi zhōng bēi hóng chá, shǎo bīng, bàn táng.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Hao3, wo3 yao4 yi1 bei1 zhong1 bei1 hong2 cha2, shao3 bing1, ban4 tang2.",
          "translation_en": "Okay, I'll have a medium black tea, less ice, half sugar.",
          "translation_ko": "네, 중간 사이즈 홍차 한 잔에 얼음 적게, 반 당으로 주세요."
        },
        {
          "speaker": "店員",
          "text": "好的，中杯紅茶少冰半糖，總共二十五塊。",
          "pinyin": "Hǎo de, zhōng bēi hóng chá shǎo bīng bàn táng, zǒng gòng èr shí wǔ kuài.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Hao3 de, zhong1 bei1 hong2 cha2 shao3 bing1 ban4 tang2, zong3 gong4 er4 shi2 wu3 kuai4.",
          "translation_en": "Okay, medium black tea with less ice and half sugar, total 25 dollars.",
          "translation_ko": "네, 중간 사이즈 홍차에 얼음 적게, 반 당, 총 25위안입니다."
        }
      ],
      "comprehension_questions": [
        {
          "question_en": "How much is the medium black tea?",
          "question_ko": "중간 사이즈 홍차는 얼마입니까?",
          "options_en": ["35 dollars", "25 dollars", "30 dollars"],
          "options_ko": ["35위안", "25위안", "30위안"],
          "correct_index": 1
        }
      ],
      "shadowing_prompt": "Repeat each line after the speaker, focusing on polite intonation.",
      "free_response_prompt": "Pretend you are the customer. Ask for the price of a large black tea, then order a medium with less ice and half sugar."
    },
    {
      "title": "請再說一次",
      "turns": [
        {
          "speaker": "店員",
          "text": "你好，請問想要喝什麼？",
          "pinyin": "Nǐ hǎo, qǐng wèn xiǎng yào hē shénme?",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Ni3 hao3, qing3 wen4 xiang3 yao4 he1 shen2 me?",
          "translation_en": "Hello, what would you like to drink?",
          "translation_ko": "안녕하세요, 무엇을 드시겠어요?"
        },
        {
          "speaker": "客人",
          "text": "不好意思，可以再說一次嗎？請說慢一點。",
          "pinyin": "Bù hǎo yì si, kě yǐ zài shuō yī cì ma? Qǐng shuō màn yī diǎn.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Bu4 hao3 yi4 si5, ke3 yi3 zai4 shuo1 yi1 ci4 ma? Qing3 shuo1 man4 yi1 dian3.",
          "translation_en": "Excuse me, could you say that again? Please speak a little slower.",
          "translation_ko": "실례합니다, 한 번 더 말씀해 주시겠어요? 조금 천천히 말씀해 주세요."
        },
        {
          "speaker": "店員",
          "text": "沒問題。請問...想要喝什麼？",
          "pinyin": "Méi wèn tí. Qǐng wèn... xiǎng yào hē shénme?",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Mei2 wen4 ti2. Qing3 wen4... xiang3 yao4 he1 shen2 me?",
          "translation_en": "No problem. What... would you like to drink?",
          "translation_ko": "문제없습니다. 무엇을... 드시겠어요?"
        },
        {
          "speaker": "客人",
          "text": "謝謝。我想要一杯小杯的豆漿，去冰。",
          "pinyin": "Xiè xiè. Wǒ xiǎng yào yī bēi xiǎo bēi de dòu jiāng, qù bīng.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Xie4 xie4. Wo3 xiang3 yao4 yi1 bei1 xiao3 bei1 de dou4 jiang1, qu4 bing1.",
          "translation_en": "Thank you. I'd like a small soy milk, no ice.",
          "translation_ko": "감사합니다. 작은 사이즈 두유 한 잔에 얼음 빼 주세요."
        },
        {
          "speaker": "店員",
          "text": "好的，小杯豆漿去冰。還要別的嗎？",
          "pinyin": "Hǎo de, xiǎo bēi dòu jiāng qù bīng. Hái yào bié de ma?",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Hao3 de, xiao3 bei1 dou4 jiang1 qu4 bing1. Hai2 yao4 bie2 de ma?",
          "translation_en": "Okay, small soy milk no ice. Anything else?",
          "translation_ko": "네, 작은 두유에 얼음 빼기요. 다른 것도 필요하신가요?"
        },
        {
          "speaker": "客人",
          "text": "不用了，謝謝。",
          "pinyin": "Bù yòng le, xiè xiè.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Bu4 yong4 le, xie4 xie4.",
          "translation_en": "No, thank you.",
          "translation_ko": "괜찮습니다, 감사합니다."
        }
      ],
      "comprehension_questions": [
        {
          "question_en": "What did the customer ask the staff to do?",
          "question_ko": "손님은 직원에게 무엇을 요청했습니까?",
          "options_en": ["Speak slower and repeat", "Give a discount", "Change the order"],
          "options_ko": ["천천히 다시 말해 달라고", "할인해 달라고", "주문을 바꿔 달라고"],
          "correct_index": 0
        }
      ],
      "shadowing_prompt": "Repeat each line after the speaker, focusing on the polite request intonation.",
      "free_response_prompt": "Pretend you are the customer. Politely ask the staff to repeat and speak slower, then order a small soy milk with no ice."
    }
  ]
}
